logs.title: Action Log
logs.clearConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to clear all log entries? This action cannot be undone.

dialogs.confirmClose: Are you sure you want to close this connection?
dialogs.confirmCloseDetached: Close detached window and disconnect the session?
dialogs.confirmExit: Are you sure you want to exit? All connections will be closed.
dialogs.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this connection?
dialogs.unsavedChanges: You have unsaved changes. Do you want to save before closing?
dialogs.connectionLost: Connection lost. Would you like to reconnect?

networkDiscovery.title: Network Discovery
networkDiscovery.noHosts: No hosts discovered yet. Start a scan to find devices on your network.

serverStats.title: Server Stats
serverStats.noSessionsDesc: Connect to an SSH server first, then collect server stats.
serverStats.selectAndCollect: Select an SSH session and click Collect to gather server statistics.

opkssh.title: opkssh — OpenPubkey SSH
opkssh.noActiveKeys: No active opkssh keys. Login to generate one.
opkssh.noKeysHint: Use Login to generate SSH keys via OIDC authentication.
opkssh.selectSessionHint: Select an SSH session to manage server opkssh config.
opkssh.selectSessionAudit: Select an SSH session to run opkssh audit.
opkssh.loadServerFirst: Click Refresh to load server config.
opkssh.installDesc: This runs the official install script via sudo. Make sure you have sudo access.
opkssh.loadConfigFirst: Click Refresh to load client config.
opkssh.envDesc: Generate the OPKSSH_PROVIDERS env var for use in scripts or CI/CD.
opkssh.auditHint: Click Run Audit to view opkssh authentication logs.

config.title: Configuration
config.enabledDesc: Enable or disable the MCP server
config.autoStartDesc: Start the MCP server automatically when the app launches
config.hostDesc: IP address the server binds to
config.portDesc: TCP port for the MCP server
config.requireAuthDesc: Require API key for all requests
config.apiKeyDesc: Bearer token or X-API-Key header value
config.exposeSensitiveDesc: Include passwords and credentials in responses
config.sessionTimeoutDesc: Seconds before an idle session expires
config.rateLimitDesc: Maximum requests per minute per session
config.corsEnabledDesc: Enable CORS headers for cross-origin requests
config.serverInstructionsDesc: Instructions returned to MCP clients during initialization

tools.title: Available Tools
tools.noToolsDesc: Tools will appear once the server provides them.

resources.title: Available Resources
resources.noResourcesDesc: Resources will appear once the server provides them.

prompts.title: Available Prompts
prompts.noPromptsDesc: Prompts will appear once the server provides them.

sessions.title: Active Sessions
sessions.noSessionsDesc: Sessions will appear when MCP clients connect.

logs.title: Server Logs
logs.noLogsDesc: Logs will appear as the server processes requests.

events.title: Events & Activity
events.noEventsDesc: Events will appear as the server processes traffic.
events.noToolCallsDesc: Tool call history will appear here.

letsEncrypt.title: Let's Encrypt / ACME Manager
letsEncrypt.noCertificatesHint: Request your first Let's Encrypt certificate above.
letsEncrypt.noAccountsHint: Register an account with your preferred Certificate Authority.
letsEncrypt.noHealthDataHint: Health checks run automatically when certificates are present.
letsEncrypt.noEventsHint: Events will appear here as certificates are managed.

keys.emptyDesc: The agent has no keys loaded. Add keys or connect to the system agent.

forwarding.emptyDesc: Agent forwarding sessions will appear here when active SSH connections use forwarding.

audit.title: Audit Log
audit.emptyDesc: Audit entries will appear here as agent operations occur.
